race.comment: PARI MOI (10) is building towards a maiden win after minor placings at her last two runs, the latest when third over 1500m at Caulfield Heath, beaten 1.75 lengths. Will find this easier than last start. Among the leading chances in this company. PLAY BOUZOUKI (4) turned in a decent effort last start to finish third over 1600m at Ararat when well-backed and looks ready now. COLIZZI (1) turned in a fair effort at Ballarat over 2000m at his last run ten weeks ago, finishing seventh and beaten 2.25 lengths. The Tassie Derby second placing looks great form for this. REEL RAIDER (11) missed the placings on debut two starts back then ran a better race and finished 4.5 lengths away in fourth last time out over 1543m at this track. Likely improver with strong prospects. SHARE THE PENNIES (12) has had more than her fair share of chances, but has placed at half her 10 starts and there's no reason she won't be around the mark again.
